name: Uninsured lawyer in Chicago used bad AI—recover anything?

acceptedAnswer.description: Pursue personal assets or bar fund if available; IL Lawyers Assistance rare for malpractice. Focus judgment collection.[2] Factors: net worth check. Small claims viable under $10K.
